narrative:
Pataskala 2-B (precinct in Licking County) has 1,402 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.7 percentage points.
